name: Pasta Shells Florentine
recipeIngredient: 1 10 oz. package of frozen chopped spinach, thawed and well-drained
1 cup light or nonfat small curd cottage cheese
2 tablespoons Herbal Pasta Magic (Chef Paul seasoning), very important
16 jumbo pasta shells, cooked and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375.
2. Mix spinach (well-drained with as much liquid squeezed out), Mozzarella cheese, cottage cheese, egg white (or substitute), Parmesan cheese, nutmeg, and Herbal Pasta Magic until blended.
3. Fill each shell with a heaping tablespoonful of spinach mixture.
4. Place in a 12x8 inch baking dish and spoon spaghetti sauce over shells.
5. Cover with foil and bake 30-40 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
